title: Permissions Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated permissions family schema. Permission templates (10 MVP + 3 Deferred), central Entra groups, project-local SharePoint groups, phase-based access manager bindings, Procore mapping ownership, Procore directory comparison posture, and external-user deferral. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/permissions.fields.json and Standard Project Site Template Contract §8, §11.2A, §11.3, §11.5, §11.6, §11.7, §12. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24).

templateKey.description: Stable internal template identifier. 10 MVP + 3 Deferred per §12.3 / §12.4.

displayName.description: Plain business label for PCC UI; never internal field name (§16.5).

assignedSpGroup.description: Project-local SharePoint group name pattern PCC-{ProjectBaseNumber}-... (D-02). Runtime ID stored in Project Site Configuration.

assignedEntraGroup.description: Central Entra group (e.g., HB-PCC-Global-Read-All). Runtime OID via configuration. D-01.

mvpTreatment.description: Decision Closure status. 10 MVP, 3 Deferred (external) per VR-18, VR-24.

assignableBy.description: Phase-based access manager role authorized to assign template. VR-27, VR-30. Preconstruction/Estimating: Estimating Coordinator, Lead Estimator, PX. Construction: PX, PM, Manager of Operational Excellence.

defaultExpiration.description: None for internal active-project; 90 days for temporary internal viewers; 30 days after stage advance for Estimating/Preconstruction. D-15.

auditRequired.description: Whether assignment requires audit trail. VR-17.

perLibraryAccess.description: Per-library access matrix; values per library code. §12.5 matrix authoritative.

centralEntraGroups.description: Catalog of central Entra groups (HB-PCC-External-Access-Approvers deferred until external access enabled). §11.2A.

projectLocalSpGroups.description: Catalog of project-local SharePoint groups (ExternalDesignTeam, OwnerClientViewer, SubcontractorLimited deferred until external access enabled). §11.2A.

phaseAccessManagerBindings.description: Phase-keyed mapping of stage to authorized inviter roles. VR-27, VR-30. §11.3.

procoreMappingOwnerRule.description: Procore mapping ownership rule. VR-11. Project Accountant explicitly NOT the mapping owner.

forbiddenOwners.description: Roles explicitly NOT the mapping owner. Must include 'Project Accountant'.

procoreDirectoryComparisonReadOnly.description: Procore directory comparison is read-only and does not auto-grant SharePoint access. VR-15. P-17.

externalUserTemplatesDeferred.description: External user permission templates exist as Deferred placeholders only. VR-18.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

templateKey.description: Permission template key. 10 MVP + 3 Deferred per Contract §12.3.
